title: Eterna
subtitle: Atlas of the Eterna Cycle
_comment: Schema: kingdoms[] -> provinces[] -> notes[]. Each note is a string title, or an object {title, days, links}. 'days' = days since last touched (drives prominence with link count). 'links' = array of other note titles (or numeric ids). 'theme' per kingdom: mountains | forest | hills | swamp | plains. Optional 'position' per kingdom: center | north | south | east | west | northeast | northwest | southeast | southwest. Top-level 'theme' picks the visual theme: sepia | midnight | ashfall | frostbound.

kingdoms.name: Example Kingdom
kingdoms.sub: Replace with an Eterna faction or domain

kingdoms.name: Second Kingdom
kingdoms.sub: Worlds need at least two kingdoms to feel real
